hero.description: Axiora connects AI agents to your inbox. They read, classify and reply to emails automatically — saving hours every week.
hero.noCard: No credit card · Set up in 5 minutes

howItWorks.label: PROCESS
howItWorks.title: Set up in 3 steps
howItWorks.step1desc: Authorize access in one click. Axiora never stores your passwords — it uses Google's OAuth protocol.
howItWorks.step2desc: Choose from pre-designed templates (support, sales, admin) or create a custom one with your instructions.
howItWorks.step3desc: From that moment, the agent reads incoming emails, generates contextual replies and sends them automatically.

agentTypes.label: SPECIALIZATION
agentTypes.title: An agent for every need
supportItems: Escalates complex cases to human team
Reduces response time from hours to seconds
salesItems: Schedules meetings with the sales team

testimonials.label: TESTIMONIALS
testimonials.title: What our customers say
testimonials.t1quote: We used to spend 4 hours a day managing support emails. Now the agent resolves everything automatically and we only review complex cases.
testimonials.t2quote: What surprised me most was the quality of the responses. Customers don't know they're talking to an AI — and support ratings have gone up.
testimonials.t3quote: We set up the sales agent in 10 minutes. In the first week it had already qualified 23 leads and scheduled 6 meetings. The ROI was immediate.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: Does the agent have access to all my emails?
faq.a1: Only to unread emails that arrive after setup. We use Google's OAuth 2.0, the same protocol used by apps like Gmail on mobile.
faq.q2: Do customers know they're talking to an AI?
faq.a2: You decide. You can configure the agent to identify itself as AI or to act as another member of your team. Most clients prefer not to mention it.
faq.q3: What if the agent doesn't know how to reply?
faq.a3: The agent is configured to escalate to a human when it detects it can't resolve the query. You'll receive a notification to intervene manually.
faq.q4: Can I cancel at any time?
faq.a4: Yes. No lock-in or penalties. Cancel whenever you want from the dashboard and you won't be charged the following month.
faq.q5: Does it work with business Gmail (Google Workspace)?
faq.a5: Yes, it works with both personal Gmail accounts and Google Workspace (formerly G Suite).
faq.q6: How long does the initial setup take?
faq.a6: Between 3 and 10 minutes. You create the account, connect your Gmail, choose an agent template and it's already working.

cta.title: Start today, free
cta.desc2: Set up your first agent in 5 minutes.
cta.contact: Questions? Write to us at hola@axiora.ai
